title: Digital Storefronts: Online Store Software | Salesforce

paragraphs: Salesforce has signed a definitive agreement to acquire Cimulate.
Deliver commerce your way with a flexible online store platform. Use templates, composable storefronts, headless APIs — or any combination of the three.

Deliver cutting-edge brand experiences with full control of your implementation. Get to market fast with out-of-the-box storefront templates and AI-guided store setup. Create unique, stand-apart experiences and promote agility with acomposablestorefront. Have your own storefront? Use it on top of ourheadlessAPIs. Mix and match any of these storefronts with a hybrid approach and create the perfect solution to exceed your goals.

Boost conversions with templates forB2C, D2C, andB2B— all designed for success and built on best practices. Automated setup flows help you quickly create feature-rich localized storefronts, customized by geography and language, translated down to the product description level, and connected to the world's #1 CRM.

Drive productivity with clicks, not code, and AI-powered automation. From Einstein Product Recommendations — which delivered over 51 billion recommendations during Cyber Week — to Agentforce Assistant for Merchants, exceed business goals with AI guidance and generative one-on-one promotions, product descriptions, and storefront design.

Extend your capabilities with a trusted network of over 8,000 certified partner apps at your fingertips, all tried and tested through rigorous security reviews and certifications. Speed time to value and generate revenue with a focus on building business solutions, not integrations.
Composable Storefronts

Drive 41% higher conversions with a fast user experience and app-like features on web. Built on Progressive Web App technology, the Composable Storefront offers 40% faster page loads and a smoother browsing experience with persistent navigation headers, content placeholders, and offline-capable mode.

Reduce costs knowing front-end hosting, scalability, and security are taken care of — with no extra fees. All the infrastructure required to build and manage your decoupled storefront is built in, so you can get to market faster and offload operational costs and burdens.

Achieve business goals with your choice of out-of-the-box functionality and third-party partners. With the most complete commerce solution, you can confidently pick what third-party solutions to integrate based on business impact alone, not the need to fill gaps. Salesforce's composable commerce ecosystem offers pre-built integrations and transparent pricing, ensuring build predictability.

Transact on every touchpoint with headless APIs. Customers and buyers are looking for you across every channel. Make sure your commerce is showing up with headless APIs, and feel empowered to build or bring your own web storefront on top of the Commerce Cloud platform.

Empower developers to move fast with the latest development tools and technology. The Salesforce Developer Portal offers a community to learn and share, as well as a one-stop-shop for APIs, sample apps, toolkits, developer docs, and support resources.

Ensure success at global scale with always-on, 99.99% historical uptime and over 2 billion shoppers on the platform across 84 countries. The world’s leading brands trust Commerce Cloud to manage high-scale events like flash sales and Cyber Week, during which our customers saw 11% more sales than the industry average.
Unify your customer data and take action on insights with AI and automation in real time.
The #1 CRM for sales helps you sell faster, smarter, and more efficiently.
Make support personal across self-service, contact centers, and in the field with built-in AI and real-time data.
Win customers. Engage efficiently. Grow revenue. This is digital marketing for lasting relationships.
Get more conversions with less work using embedded AI.

Launch a direct-to-consumer storefront with marketing, sales, and service capabilities built into an easy-to-use CRM suite. Connect every touchpoint with unified data and enhance customer experiences on every channel.
Sign up for our monthly commerce newsletter to get the latest research, industry insights, and product news delivered straight to your inbox.
Tell us a bit more so the right person can reach out faster.
Get the latest research, industry insights, and product news delivered straight to your inbox.
Connect with us for daily insights and a front-row seat to new innovations.

An online store platform is a solution to build and manage the customer-facing digital experience andecommerce websitesthat shoppers and buyers interact with. The platform usually includes templates, front-end infrastructure, and APIs.
If your business sells or engages customers online, you'll need online store software.

An online store platform enables you to build a digital experience to engage and convert your customers. You should look for an online store platform that gives you the flexibility to build the digital storefront your way, whether that’s through templates,composable commerce,headlessAPIs — or a combination of all three.
Online storefront software integrates with yourcommerce platform(either natively or through APIs) and includes all the tools to build and manage the customer-facing experience.
